mapper.select:
SELECT id, tenant_id, app_account_id, certification_type, certification_status, apply_time, audit_time, expire_time, certification_fee, payment_status, payment_time, payment_order_no, rejection_reason, audit_remark, is_deleted, create_time, update_time FROM registry_certification
AND tenant_id LIKE CONCAT(#{queryParams.tenantId}, '%')
AND app_account_id LIKE CONCAT(#{queryParams.appAccountId}, '%')
AND certification_status LIKE CONCAT(#{queryParams.certificationStatus}, '%')
AND audit_time LIKE CONCAT(#{queryParams.auditTime}, '%')
